EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, SHUNG ZEE M SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-27-2012

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON NOV-16-2011 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT SHUNG WONG'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. FULL PAYMENT OF FEES IS DUE BY 12/16/11. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF SHUNG ZEE M WONG ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
